## The Code Runs {.sm-finale-slide}

```{=html}
<style>
.reveal section.sm-finale-slide .sm-finale {
  height: 535px;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-rows: 1fr auto;
  gap: 0.9rem;
  align-items: stretch;
}

.reveal section.sm-finale-slide .sm-finale-flow {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1.35fr) 90px minmax(0, 1fr);
  gap: 0.75rem;
  align-items: center;
}

.reveal section.sm-finale-slide .sm-finale-stack {
  display: grid;
  gap: 0.55rem;
}

.reveal section.sm-finale-slide .sm-finale-row,
.reveal section.sm-finale-slide .sm-finale-process {
  border: 1px solid rgba(142, 197, 255, 0.24);
  border-radius: 6px;
  background: rgba(2, 7, 14, 0.74);
}

.reveal section.sm-finale-slide .sm-finale-row {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.12fr;
  min-height: 106px;
}

.reveal section.sm-finale-slide .sm-finale-principle,
.reveal section.sm-finale-slide .sm-finale-formula {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: center;
  padding: 0.5rem 0.7rem;
}

.reveal section.sm-finale-slide .sm-finale-principle {
  border-right: 1px solid rgba(142, 197, 255, 0.16);
}

.reveal section.sm-finale-slide .sm-finale-kicker {
  color: #ffd166;
  font-size: 0.46em;
  font-weight: 800;
  letter-spacing: 0;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.reveal section.sm-finale-slide .sm-finale-title {
  margin-top: 0.18rem;
  color: #f6fbff;
  font-size: 0.78em;
  font-weight: 800;
  line-height: 1.12;
}

.reveal section.sm-finale-slide .sm-finale-note {
  margin-top: 0.2rem;
  color: #b8d3e5;
  font-size: 0.46em;
  line-height: 1.2;
}

.reveal section.sm-finale-slide .sm-finale-formula {
  color: #f6fbff;
  font-size: 0.68em;
  text-align: center;
}

.reveal section.sm-finale-slide .sm-finale-arrow {
  color: #ffd166;
  font-size: 2.7em;
  font-weight: 400;
  text-align: center;
  filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(255, 209, 102, 0.45));
}

.reveal section.sm-finale-slide .sm-finale-process {
  min-height: 290px;
  display: grid;
  align-content: center;
  justify-items: center;
  padding: 1rem 0.85rem;
  text-align: center;
}

.reveal section.sm-finale-slide .sm-finale-process-label {
  color: #ffd166;
  font-size: 0.52em;
  font-weight: 800;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.reveal section.sm-finale-slide .sm-finale-process-formula {
  margin: 0.65rem 0 0.45rem;
  color: #f6fbff;
  font-size: 1.12em;
}

.reveal section.sm-finale-slide .sm-finale-process-note {
  max-width: 340px;
  color: #b8d3e5;
  font-size: 0.52em;
  line-height: 1.24;
}

.reveal section.sm-finale-slide .sm-finale-statement {
  padding: 0.65rem 0.85rem;
  border-top: 2px solid rgba(255, 209, 102, 0.72);
  color: #f6fbff;
  font-size: 0.9em;
  font-weight: 800;
  line-height: 1.18;
  text-align: center;
}

.reveal section.sm-finale-slide .sm-finale-statement strong {
  color: #ffd166;
}

.reveal section.present.sm-finale-slide .sm-finale-row {
  animation: sm-finale-row 7.8s ease-in-out 1 both;
}

.reveal section.present.sm-finale-slide .sm-finale-row:nth-child(1) {
  animation-delay: 0s;
}

.reveal section.present.sm-finale-slide .sm-finale-row:nth-child(2) {
  animation-delay: 1.1s;
}

.reveal section.present.sm-finale-slide .sm-finale-row:nth-child(3) {
  animation-delay: 2.2s;
}

.reveal section.present.sm-finale-slide .sm-finale-arrow {
  animation: sm-finale-arrow 7.8s ease-in-out 1 both;
}

.reveal section.present.sm-finale-slide .sm-finale-process {
  animation: sm-finale-process 7.8s ease-in-out 1 both;
}

.reveal section.present.sm-finale-slide .sm-finale-statement {
  animation: sm-finale-statement 7.8s ease-in-out 1 both;
}

@keyframes sm-finale-row {
  0%,
  15%,
  100% {
    border-color: rgba(142, 197, 255, 0.24);
    box-shadow: none;
  }
  6%,
  10% {
    border-color: rgba(255, 209, 102, 0.78);
    box-shadow: 0 0 18px rgba(255, 209, 102, 0.16);
  }
}

@keyframes sm-finale-arrow {
  0%,
  38% {
    opacity: 0.3;
    transform: translateX(-8px);
  }
  45%,
  70% {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translateX(0);
  }
  100% {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translateX(0);
  }
}

@keyframes sm-finale-process {
  0%,
  43% {
    border-color: rgba(142, 197, 255, 0.24);
    box-shadow: none;
  }
  52%,
  78% {
    border-color: rgba(142, 197, 255, 0.72);
    box-shadow: 0 0 22px rgba(142, 197, 255, 0.18);
  }
  100% {
    border-color: rgba(142, 197, 255, 0.56);
    box-shadow: 0 0 18px rgba(142, 197, 255, 0.12);
  }
}

@keyframes sm-finale-statement {
  0%,
  58% {
    opacity: 0.58;
  }
  70%,
  100% {
    opacity: 1;
  }
}
</style>

<div class="sm-finale" role="img" aria-label="The Standard Model turns consistency principles into formulas and observable weak decays.">
  <div class="sm-finale-flow">
    <div class="sm-finale-stack">
      <div class="sm-finale-row">
        <div class="sm-finale-principle">
          <div class="sm-finale-kicker">principle</div>
          <div class="sm-finale-title">local gauge symmetry</div>
          <div class="sm-finale-note">interactions are forced by local phase freedom</div>
        </div>
        <div class="sm-finale-formula">
          \(D_\mu=\partial_\mu+igA_\mu\)
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="sm-finale-row">
        <div class="sm-finale-principle">
          <div class="sm-finale-kicker">condensate</div>
          <div class="sm-finale-title">spontaneous symmetry breaking</div>
          <div class="sm-finale-note">weak carriers become massive</div>
        </div>
        <div class="sm-finale-formula">
          \(M_W=\dfrac{gv}{2}\)
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="sm-finale-row">
        <div class="sm-finale-principle">
          <div class="sm-finale-kicker">coupling</div>
          <div class="sm-finale-title">chiral fermions meet the Higgs field</div>
          <div class="sm-finale-note">left and right become massive normal modes</div>
        </div>
        <div class="sm-finale-formula">
          \(m_f=\dfrac{y_fv}{\sqrt2}\)
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="sm-finale-arrow">⇒</div>

    <div class="sm-finale-process">
      <div class="sm-finale-process-label">observable process</div>
      <div class="sm-finale-process-formula">
        \(n\rightarrow p+e^-+\bar\nu_e\)
      </div>
      <div class="sm-finale-process-note">
        weak vertex, massive particles, chiral structure, one calculable quantum amplitude
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="sm-finale-statement">
    The Standard Model is not a list of particles. <strong>It is a consistency machine.</strong>
  </div>
</div>
```
